TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: qalang_Sqoyaw環山部落
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == mwani qalang ro cyan te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang Sqoyaw maki kya pucing skura byaqan wagi ro skura hrhul cqa rgyax B'bu Mlalin, mtama kya rgyax Pinyen skura byaqan wagi ro skura hrhul, skura byaqan wagi ga ksobih ki bawiq llyung Tmali na hbun llyung Sqeran ro llyung Qyawan. skura htgan wagi qalang naha ga maki qara ryaniq Girang nqa ryaniq Pepuhenkwan hnasun nya. qalang qani ga cbalay tyaba na qalang maki ryaniq qani. skahul qalang Sqoyaw gmlux ryaniq skura kya hrhul ga baq thehok qalang Slamaw, ro skura kya t'ltu lga baq tehok qmayah Uring. . cinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 lalu qalang Sqoyaw qani ga maki saying pinqyuwan, te qutux ga maki ryax klhangan Ipun ga san naha Sqoyaw qa cquliq Ipun, imi nya ga "pqasan na ryaniq", te saying ga lalu Sqoyaw qani imi nya ga piyux rruma ma. "Sqoayaw",意指"歡樂小街",第二為Sqoyaw其名為竹林繁茂之意. pinhknyan qalang 部落遷徙 pinqyuwan maha puqing mrhow naha ga knahul Pinsbkan qalang Mstbwan. 相傳其祖先居住於Pinsbkan . tayal qa nyan qalang Sqoyaw mwani 人口概況 qalang Sqoyaw magan kbhul mqesu pgan magan qabax cquliq naha, ro hbku ski mpux payat kawas na laqi mrkyas ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki akya mpux mtuyu cquliq nya, ro mpux magan mpux magan kawas na klokah hayi na cquliq ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki miman magan cquliq nya, ro miman magan kawas na yutas yaki, qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mpusal qesu cquliq nya. ro tayux kahul cqenu minrok naha hiya ga, cquliq Tayal qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mqesu pgan qutux cquliq nya, ro binah lga cquliq binah minrok la. qalang Sqoyaw hiya ga snhyan naha utux Tayal, ro maki gaga cmyus uyi. snhe naha maha baq maray mblaq na qnxan ro kmloh, mwani ga maki cikay cquliq musa Tensinkyo ini ga Kiristo kyokay, maki uyi cquliq snhe utux Kahat. cpiyang yaw tnpila: qalang Sqoyaw hiya cpyanga mrwa kblay qeqaya ini ga mqupah, maki uyi cquliq nyan mawah bbesan, ro pinqumah hiya ga ana ocya, pagay, ro bway qhoniq, kbalay na qeqaya hiya ga, ana patas qhoniq, tminun na ruma, binah lga wal heci mtiyaw ini ga mqwas la. gmlux glgan: skahul aki Lutung gmlux basu ro skura qalang Slamaw, pbiyaq cqa qalang Sqoyaw. qmuyit glgan: pbiyaq byaqan qara ryaniq Girang ski Tayhuk, ro mc'ubuy ryaniq Syentaw 192 ro ryaniq Sengtaw 9 ski Girang, skura glax ryaniq sengtaw 7, ro si shoyu musa lro tehok su la. 開車: . ki'an pklahang binheci 文化健康站 qalang Sqoyaw hiya ga baha hmcwa khmay ciyan cquliq naha la, mica qa knalay naha ki'an pklahang bnheci naha, ro sobih na qalang Slamaw hiya ga maki mblaq na psbaqan ro byoing phgup. pincrux uyi pqwasan biru ro byoing, musa mkrax kinmxan cquliq ro psbaq llaqi. qalang Sqoyaw qani ga qalang Tayal, kruma cquliq naha kmayal ke Tayal uyi, ksobih kawas mwani ga nyan kblay yaw na qalang qa naha, us ga cipak hayi kblay yaw na cyunga, baha hmcwa cyunga ga uka cquliq musa qmuyiy ke Tayal ro mwani lga m_ngyut mnukil qabax bnheci naha la, mica qa uka uyi cquliq snibil gaga Tayal la. .
S.PHON: == mwani qalaŋ ro ʦ~ʨjan te inu ******* == qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw maki kja puʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ro s~ɕkura ħrħul ʦ~ʨqa rɣjax βʔβu mlalin, mtama kja rɣjax pinjen s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ro s~ɕkura ħrħul, s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ɣa ks~ɕoβiħ ki βawiq lljuŋ tmali na ħβun lljuŋ s~ɕqeran ro lljuŋ qjawan. s~ɕkura ħtɣan waɣi qalaŋ naħa ɣa maki qara rjaniq ɣiraŋ nqa rjaniq pepuħenkwan ħnas~ɕun nja. qalaŋ qani ɣa ʦ~ʨβalaj tjaβa na qalaŋ maki rjaniq qani. s~ɕkaħul qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ɣmlux rjaniq s~ɕkura kja ħrħul ɣa βaq tħeħok qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, ro s~ɕkura kja tʔltu lɣa βaq teħok qmajaħ uriŋ. . ʦ~ʨinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** lalu qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw qani ɣa maki s~ɕajiŋ pinqjuwan, te qutux ɣa maki rjax klħaŋan ipun ɣa s~ɕan naħa s~ɕqojaw qa ʦ~ʨquliq ipun, imi nja ɣa "pqas~ɕan na rjaniq", te s~ɕajiŋ ɣa lalu s~ɕqojaw qani imi nja ɣa pijux rruma ma. "s~ɕqoajaw",**"****",***s~ɕqojaw*********. pinħknjan qalaŋ **** pinqjuwan maħa puqiŋ mrħow naħa ɣa knaħul pins~ɕβkan qalaŋ ms~ɕtβwan. ********pins~ɕβkan . tajal qa njan qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw mwani **** qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw maɣan kβħul mqes~ɕu pɣan maɣan qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq naħa, ro ħβku s~ɕki mpux pajat kawas~ɕ na laqi mrkjas~ɕ ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki akja mpux mtuju ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro mpux maɣan mpux maɣan kawas~ɕ na klokaħ ħaji na ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki miman maɣan ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro miman maɣan kawas~ɕ na jutas~ɕ jaki, qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mpus~ɕal qes~ɕu ʦ~ʨquliq nja. ro tajux kaħul ʦ~ʨqenu minrok naħa ħija ɣa, ʦ~ʨquliq tajal qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mqes~ɕu pɣan qutux ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro βinaħ lɣa ʦ~ʨquliq βinaħ minrok la. qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ɣa s~ɕnħjan naħa utux tajal, ro maki ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨmjus~ɕ uji. s~ɕnħe naħa maħa βaq maraj mβlaq na qnxan ro kmloħ, mwani ɣa maki ʦ~ʨikaj ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa tens~ɕinkjo ini ɣa kiris~ɕto kjokaj, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕnħe utux kaħat. ʦ~ʨpijaŋ jaw tnpila: qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ʦ~ʨpjaŋa mrwa kβlaj qeqaja ini ɣa mqupaħ, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq njan mawaħ ββes~ɕan, ro pinqumaħ ħija ɣa ana oʦ~ʨja, paɣaj, ro βwaj qħoniq, kβalaj na qeqaja ħija ɣa, ana patas~ɕ qħoniq, tminun na ruma, βinaħ lɣa wal ħeʦ~ʨi mtijaw ini ɣa mqwas~ɕ la. ɣmlux ɣlɣan: s~ɕkaħul aki lutuŋ ɣmlux βas~ɕu ro s~ɕkura qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, pβijaq ʦ~ʨqa qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw. qmujit ɣlɣan: pβijaq βjaqan qara rjaniq ɣiraŋ s~ɕki tajħuk, ro mʦ~ʨʔuβuj rjaniq s~ɕjentaw *** ro rjaniq s~ɕeŋtaw * s~ɕki ɣiraŋ, s~ɕkura ɣlax rjaniq s~ɕeŋtaw *, ro s~ɕi s~ɕħoju mus~ɕa lro teħok s~ɕu la. **: . kiʔan pklaħaŋ βinħeʦ~ʨi ***** qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ɣa βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa kħmaj ʦ~ʨijan ʦ~ʨquliq naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa knalaj naħa kiʔan pklaħaŋ βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa, ro s~ɕoβiħ na qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa maki mβlaq na ps~ɕβaqan ro βjoiŋ pħɣup. pinʦ~ʨrux uji pqwas~ɕan βiru ro βjoiŋ, mus~ɕa mkrax kinmxan ʦ~ʨquliq ro ps~ɕβaq llaqi. qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw qani ɣa qalaŋ tajal, kruma ʦ~ʨquliq naħa kmajal ke tajal uji, ks~ɕoβiħ kawas~ɕ mwani ɣa njan kβlaj jaw na qalaŋ qa naħa, us~ɕ ɣa ʦ~ʨipak ħaji kβlaj jaw na ʦ~ʨjuŋa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa uka ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qmujij ke tajal ro mwani lɣa məŋjut mnukil qaβax βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa uka uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕniβil ɣaɣa tajal la. .
S.FORM: == mwani qalang ro cyan te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang Sqoyaw maki kya pucing skura byaqan wagi ro skura hrhul cqa rgyax B'bu Mlalin, mtama kya rgyax Pinyen skura byaqan wagi ro skura hrhul, skura byaqan wagi ga ksobih ki bawiq llyung Tmali na hbun llyung Sqeran ro llyung Qyawan. skura htgan wagi qalang naha ga maki qara ryaniq Girang nqa ryaniq Pepuhenkwan hnasun nya. qalang qani ga cbalay tyaba na qalang maki ryaniq qani. skahul qalang Sqoyaw gmlux ryaniq skura kya hrhul ga baq thehok qalang Slamaw, ro skura kya t'ltu lga baq tehok qmayah Uring. . cinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 lalu qalang Sqoyaw qani ga maki saying pinqyuwan, te qutux ga maki ryax klhangan Ipun ga san naha Sqoyaw qa cquliq Ipun, imi nya ga "pqasan na ryaniq", te saying ga lalu Sqoyaw qani imi nya ga piyux rruma ma. "Sqoayaw",意指"歡樂小街",第二為Sqoyaw其名為竹林繁茂之意. pinhknyan qalang 部落遷徙 pinqyuwan maha puqing mrhow naha ga knahul Pinsbkan qalang Mstbwan. 相傳其祖先居住於Pinsbkan . tayal qa nyan qalang Sqoyaw mwani 人口概況 qalang Sqoyaw magan kbhul mqesu pgan magan qabax cquliq naha, ro hbku ski mpux payat kawas na laqi mrkyas ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki akya mpux mtuyu cquliq nya, ro mpux magan mpux magan kawas na klokah hayi na cquliq ga qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki miman magan cquliq nya, ro miman magan kawas na yutas yaki, qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mpusal qesu cquliq nya. ro tayux kahul cqenu minrok naha hiya ga, cquliq Tayal qutux kbhul qabax cquliq ga maki mqesu pgan qutux cquliq nya, ro binah lga cquliq binah minrok la. qalang Sqoyaw hiya ga snhyan naha utux Tayal, ro maki gaga cmyus uyi. snhe naha maha baq maray mblaq na qnxan ro kmloh, mwani ga maki cikay cquliq musa Tensinkyo ini ga Kiristo kyokay, maki uyi cquliq snhe utux Kahat. cpiyang yaw tnpila: qalang Sqoyaw hiya cpyanga mrwa kblay qeqaya ini ga mqupah, maki uyi cquliq nyan mawah bbesan, ro pinqumah hiya ga ana ocya, pagay, ro bway qhoniq, kbalay na qeqaya hiya ga, ana patas qhoniq, tminun na ruma, binah lga wal heci mtiyaw ini ga mqwas la. gmlux glgan: skahul aki Lutung gmlux basu ro skura qalang Slamaw, pbiyaq cqa qalang Sqoyaw. qmuyit glgan: pbiyaq byaqan qara ryaniq Girang ski Tayhuk, ro mc'ubuy ryaniq Syentaw 192 ro ryaniq Sengtaw 9 ski Girang, skura glax ryaniq sengtaw 7, ro si shoyu musa lro tehok su la. 開車: . ki'an pklahang binheci 文化健康站 qalang Sqoyaw hiya ga baha hmcwa khmay ciyan cquliq naha la, mica qa knalay naha ki'an pklahang bnheci naha, ro sobih na qalang Slamaw hiya ga maki mblaq na psbaqan ro byoing phgup. pincrux uyi pqwasan biru ro byoing, musa mkrax kinmxan cquliq ro psbaq llaqi. qalang Sqoyaw qani ga qalang Tayal, kruma cquliq naha kmayal ke Tayal uyi, ksobih kawas mwani ga nyan kblay yaw na qalang qa naha, us ga cipak hayi kblay yaw na cyunga, baha hmcwa cyunga ga uka cquliq musa qmuyiy ke Tayal ro mwani lga m_ngyut mnukil qabax bnheci naha la, mica qa uka uyi cquliq snibil gaga Tayal la. .
S.PHON: == mwani qalaŋ ro ʦ~ʨjan te inu ******* == qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw maki kja puʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ro s~ɕkura ħrħul ʦ~ʨqa rɣjax βʔβu mlalin, mtama kja rɣjax pinjen s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ro s~ɕkura ħrħul, s~ɕkura βjaqan waɣi ɣa ks~ɕoβiħ ki βawiq lljuŋ tmali na ħβun lljuŋ s~ɕqeran ro lljuŋ qjawan. s~ɕkura ħtɣan waɣi qalaŋ naħa ɣa maki qara rjaniq ɣiraŋ nqa rjaniq pepuħenkwan ħnas~ɕun nja. qalaŋ qani ɣa ʦ~ʨβalaj tjaβa na qalaŋ maki rjaniq qani. s~ɕkaħul qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ɣmlux rjaniq s~ɕkura kja ħrħul ɣa βaq tħeħok qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, ro s~ɕkura kja tʔltu lɣa βaq teħok qmajaħ uriŋ. . ʦ~ʨinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** lalu qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw qani ɣa maki s~ɕajiŋ pinqjuwan, te qutux ɣa maki rjax klħaŋan ipun ɣa s~ɕan naħa s~ɕqojaw qa ʦ~ʨquliq ipun, imi nja ɣa "pqas~ɕan na rjaniq", te s~ɕajiŋ ɣa lalu s~ɕqojaw qani imi nja ɣa pijux rruma ma. "s~ɕqoajaw",**"****",***s~ɕqojaw*********. pinħknjan qalaŋ **** pinqjuwan maħa puqiŋ mrħow naħa ɣa knaħul pins~ɕβkan qalaŋ ms~ɕtβwan. ********pins~ɕβkan . tajal qa njan qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw mwani **** qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw maɣan kβħul mqes~ɕu pɣan maɣan qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq naħa, ro ħβku s~ɕki mpux pajat kawas~ɕ na laqi mrkjas~ɕ ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki akja mpux mtuju ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro mpux maɣan mpux maɣan kawas~ɕ na klokaħ ħaji na ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki miman maɣan ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro miman maɣan kawas~ɕ na jutas~ɕ jaki, qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mpus~ɕal qes~ɕu ʦ~ʨquliq nja. ro tajux kaħul ʦ~ʨqenu minrok naħa ħija ɣa, ʦ~ʨquliq tajal qutux kβħul qaβax ʦ~ʨquliq ɣa maki mqes~ɕu pɣan qutux ʦ~ʨquliq nja, ro βinaħ lɣa ʦ~ʨquliq βinaħ minrok la. qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ɣa s~ɕnħjan naħa utux tajal, ro maki ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨmjus~ɕ uji. s~ɕnħe naħa maħa βaq maraj mβlaq na qnxan ro kmloħ, mwani ɣa maki ʦ~ʨikaj ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa tens~ɕinkjo ini ɣa kiris~ɕto kjokaj, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕnħe utux kaħat. ʦ~ʨpijaŋ jaw tnpila: qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ʦ~ʨpjaŋa mrwa kβlaj qeqaja ini ɣa mqupaħ, maki uji ʦ~ʨquliq njan mawaħ ββes~ɕan, ro pinqumaħ ħija ɣa ana oʦ~ʨja, paɣaj, ro βwaj qħoniq, kβalaj na qeqaja ħija ɣa, ana patas~ɕ qħoniq, tminun na ruma, βinaħ lɣa wal ħeʦ~ʨi mtijaw ini ɣa mqwas~ɕ la. ɣmlux ɣlɣan: s~ɕkaħul aki lutuŋ ɣmlux βas~ɕu ro s~ɕkura qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw, pβijaq ʦ~ʨqa qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw. qmujit ɣlɣan: pβijaq βjaqan qara rjaniq ɣiraŋ s~ɕki tajħuk, ro mʦ~ʨʔuβuj rjaniq s~ɕjentaw *** ro rjaniq s~ɕeŋtaw * s~ɕki ɣiraŋ, s~ɕkura ɣlax rjaniq s~ɕeŋtaw *, ro s~ɕi s~ɕħoju mus~ɕa lro teħok s~ɕu la. **: . kiʔan pklaħaŋ βinħeʦ~ʨi ***** qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw ħija ɣa βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa kħmaj ʦ~ʨijan ʦ~ʨquliq naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa knalaj naħa kiʔan pklaħaŋ βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa, ro s~ɕoβiħ na qalaŋ s~ɕlamaw ħija ɣa maki mβlaq na ps~ɕβaqan ro βjoiŋ pħɣup. pinʦ~ʨrux uji pqwas~ɕan βiru ro βjoiŋ, mus~ɕa mkrax kinmxan ʦ~ʨquliq ro ps~ɕβaq llaqi. qalaŋ s~ɕqojaw qani ɣa qalaŋ tajal, kruma ʦ~ʨquliq naħa kmajal ke tajal uji, ks~ɕoβiħ kawas~ɕ mwani ɣa njan kβlaj jaw na qalaŋ qa naħa, us~ɕ ɣa ʦ~ʨipak ħaji kβlaj jaw na ʦ~ʨjuŋa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ʦ~ʨjuŋa ɣa uka ʦ~ʨquliq mus~ɕa qmujij ke tajal ro mwani lɣa məŋjut mnukil qaβax βnħeʦ~ʨi naħa la, miʦ~ʨa qa uka uji ʦ~ʨquliq s~ɕniβil ɣaɣa tajal la. .
